tasks.subject: Task 1: NoExpansion appends includedWeapons
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Under ExpansionMode.NoExpansion, overrideEntry.IncludedWeapons is appended to the condition's weapon list. Excludes and aliases continue to apply.

**Files:**
- Modify: AddMissingQuestRequirements/Pipeline/Weapon/WeaponArrayExpander.cs:83-89
- Test: AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Pipeline/Weapon/WeaponArrayExpanderTests.cs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Single-weapon condition + override {NoExpansion, IncludedWeapons=["TypeName"]} adds every type member.
- Bare-id IncludedWeapons appended once.
- Original weapons preserved.
- ExcludedWeapons still removed after additions.
- Existing WhitelistOnly_* / Auto_* tests still pass.

**Verify:** `dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~WeaponArrayExpanderTests"` green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AddMissingQuestRequirements/Pipeline/Weapon/WeaponArrayExpander.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Pipeline/Weapon/WeaponArrayExpanderTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~WeaponArrayExpanderTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["NoExpansion + type name appends all members", "NoExpansion + bare id appends once", "original weapons preserved", "excludes still apply", "existing tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: MergeHelper MoreRestrictive priority
tasks.description:
**Goal:** When two QuestOverrideEntry merge under MERGE, the more restrictive mode wins by intent (WhitelistOnly > NoExpansion > Auto), not by enum int value.

**Files:**
- Modify: AddMissingQuestRequirements/Util/MergeHelper.cs:309-321
- Test: AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Util/MergeHelperTests.cs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- WhitelistOnly vs NoExpansion → WhitelistOnly
- NoExpansion vs Auto → NoExpansion
- WhitelistOnly vs Auto → WhitelistOnly
- Same three for ModsExpansionMode
- Existing MergeHelperTests pass or updated to new priority.

**Verify:** `dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~MergeHelperTests"` green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AddMissingQuestRequirements/Util/MergeHelper.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Util/MergeHelperTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~MergeHelperTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["WhitelistOnly beats NoExpansion", "NoExpansion beats Auto", "WhitelistOnly beats Auto", "mirror for ModsExpansionMode"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Doc updates (ExpansionMode + CLAUDE.md)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** ExpansionMode XML doc and CLAUDE.md key behavioural rules describe post-fix NoExpansion semantics.

**Files:**
- Modify: AddMissingQuestRequirements/Models/ExpansionMode.cs:27-33
- Modify: CLAUDE.md (§Key behavioural rules)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- ExpansionMode.NoExpansion XML doc states includedWeapons still appended.
- CLAUDE.md describes NoExpansion appending IncludedWeapons.
- `grep -rn "whitelist additions are suppressed" AddMissingQuestRequirements/ CLAUDE.md` returns nothing.

**Verify:** `dotnet build -c Release` clean.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AddMissingQuestRequirements/Models/ExpansionMode.cs", "CLAUDE.md"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && grep -rn 'whitelist additions are suppressed' AddMissingQuestRequirements/ CLAUDE.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["XML doc updated", "CLAUDE.md updated", "no stale wording"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: QuestStatus enum + classification
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Each QuestResult carries one mutually-exclusive QuestStatus of Blacklisted|NoEligibleConditions|Noop|Expanded. Legacy bool Noop getter removed.

**Files:**
- Create: AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/QuestStatus.cs
- Modify: AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/InspectorResult.cs:63-73
- Modify: AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/ReportBuilder.cs:166-248
- Modify: AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/HtmlReportWriter.cs (JsonSerializerOptions)
- Create: AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Reporting/QuestStatusTests.cs

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- Enum defined.
- QuestResult.Status required init; Noop getter removed.
- BuildQuestList sets Status by precedence Blacklisted > NoEligibleConditions > Noop > Expanded.
- JSON serializes enum as string.
- 4 classification tests green.
- Pre-existing quest.Noop usages migrated to Status == QuestStatus.Noop.

**Verify:** `dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName!~Integration"` green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/QuestStatus.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/InspectorResult.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/ReportBuilder.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/HtmlReportWriter.cs", "AddMissingQuestRequirements.Tests/Reporting/QuestStatusTests.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName!~Integration\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["enum defined", "Status required", "Noop getter removed", "precedence applied", "JSON string enum", "4 classification tests", "migrated usages"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: HTML filter bar + badge CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Quests tab filter bar replaces single Hide NOOP checkbox with four status checkboxes; CSS gains badge-blacklisted and badge-empty.

**Files:**
- Modify: AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/HtmlReportWriter.cs (CSS + quest filter bar)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- 4 named status-cb checkboxes; Expanded checked by default.
- CSS .badge-blacklisted (red) + .badge-empty (gray) + .status-filter layout.
- HtmlReportWriter tests still pass.

**Verify:** `dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName~HtmlReportWriterTests"` green.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/HtmlReportWriter.cs"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName~HtmlReportWriterTests\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["4 checkboxes with correct values", "badge CSS added", "writer tests pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: report.js badge + multi-checkbox filter + session migration
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Rendered Quests panel shows status-specific badge per quest; new four-checkbox filter shows/hides rows with AND-intersection vs search; sessionStorage holds statusFilter[] with legacy hideNoop upgrade.

**Files:**
- Modify: AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/Assets/report.js (renderQuests, filterQuests, persist/restore)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- div.dataset.status = q.status.
- Badge per status with correct CSS class and text.
- filterQuests intersects search and checked-status set.
- persist writes statusFilter[].
- restore reads statusFilter[]; legacy hideNoop bool upgrades to ["Expanded"] or full set.
- Old-report compatibility: q.status falls back via q.noop.

**Verify:** Manual — inspector report renders, filter UX works.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["AddMissingQuestRequirements/Reporting/Assets/report.js"], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet run --project AddMissingQuestRequirements.Inspector", "acceptanceCriteria": ["dataset.status set", "4 badges work", "filter intersects search", "persist statusFilter", "restore + legacy upgrade", "compat fallback"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Full-suite verification + manual Lotus check
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Bundled changes pass automated tests and produce expected output on user's reported Lotus quests.

**Files:** none modified.

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- `dotnet build -c Release` clean: 0 warnings, 0 errors.
- `dotnet test --filter "FullyQualifiedName!~Integration"` green.
- `dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"` green or no-op.
- Inspector report against AMQWR-patches-4.x/Lotus shows expected behaviour on 67ea813bd8d2dc676746f53e, 6748690cb0fff3f2a5ba3d47, 67486a44ec1dc8048f7cb2dc.
- Default HTML filter shows only Expanded; toggling reveals other buckets.

**Verify:** see steps in plan task 7.

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "dotnet build -c Release && dotnet test --filter \"FullyQualifiedName!~Integration\"", "acceptanceCriteria": ["build clean", "all unit tests green", "integration green or no-op", "3 Lotus quests verified", "HTML filter UX verified"]}
```
